entities.name: JARASINGHA
entities.description: A village featuring kitchen gardens within settlements attached to dwelling units.

entities.name: KITCHEN GARDEN
entities.description: Small-scale gardens within settlements used to supplement livelihood options.

entities.name: VEGETABLES
entities.description: Various types of edible plants cultivated in kitchen gardens.

entities.name: GROUNDWATER
entities.description: Water source used for cultivating vegetables in the kitchen gardens.

entities.name: BOREWELLS
entities.description: Means of extracting groundwater shared between households.

entities.name: LEAFY VEGETABLES
entities.description: Types of vegetables cultivated specifically during the summer season.

entities.name: SUMMER
entities.description: The season during which leafy vegetables are grown and organic cultivation is practiced.

entities.name: CAULIFLOWER
entities.description: A vegetable cultivated during the Kharif season based on market demand.

entities.name: KHARIF
entities.description: The season during which cauliflower is grown and chemical inputs are used.

entities.name: LOCAL MARKET DEMAND
entities.description: The economic driver causing a shift in crop selection to cauliflower during Kharif.

entities.name: ORGANIC CULTIVATION
entities.description: Agricultural practice used during the summer season.

entities.name: CHEMICAL FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Inputs used for crop cultivation during the Kharif season.

entities.name: PESTICIDES
entities.description: Inputs used for crop protection during the Kharif season.
